_comment: Stable slugs from data/resume_pack.json as of 2026-07-09. Never rename entries that may have R2 media keyed by slug.

migrationNotes.dimension-3: Existing org slug is 'dimension-3', not 'dimension-3-fabrication'. The project slug 'dimension-3-fabrication' refers to the Multi-Machine build.
migrationNotes.mojo-3d-print-lab: Org represents Mojo Coworking 3D Print Lab role; archive file is Mojo_Coworking.md.
migrationNotes.experiments: Legacy R&D project retained from current package. Not in Phase 1 scope list but preserved for media continuity.
migrationNotes.nebula-app: Existing project with featuredDiscover in live pack; Phase 1 featured list uses parent Nebula platform instead.
